subject: Biology
title: Marine Protected Areas
description: A quick, practical guide to Marine Protected Areas.

hook.text: In marine reserves where fishing is banned, fish populations can double within five years.

buildup.text: Marine protected areas (MPAs) are zones where human activity is restricted to let ecosystems recover.

discovery.text: Only about 8% of the ocean is currently protected—far below the 30% scientists recommend by 2030.

twist.text: Fish from healthy MPAs spill over into surrounding waters, boosting catches for local fishermen.

climax.text: The 30×30 initiative aims to protect 30% of Earth's ocean by 2030—the most ambitious conservation goal ever.

punchline.text: Protect the ocean, and it protects us back.

quiz.question: What percentage of the ocean is currently protected?
